creator: alfredo@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,
I would like to change the e-mail address from my account at https://bugs.freebsd.org/ but it won't let me change it, complaining about the password (log-in auth is fine, I cannot change account details).

My ID is "alfredo@freebsd.org", and I would like to change the e-mail address to "alfredo@freebsd.org" as well.

Thanks!
